subcodes.first_line: O My Leaf! Upon thee be My glory and My loving-kindness. This is the Day of Revelation, and He Who conversed on Sinai is established upon the throne of utterance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ورقتی علیک بهائی و عنایتی امروز روز ظهور است و مکلم طور بر عرش بیان مستوی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @station of the Manifestation of God, @thankfulness; gratitude
